Home FAQ
FAQ

Questions, answered straight.

If something here doesn't cover it, just ask — we'd rather answer honestly than pad a page.

Working Together

How long does a typical project take?

Most custom websites take 3–6 weeks depending on scope. Automation projects usually run 1–3 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline up front.

What does working together actually look like?

A short discovery call, a fixed-scope proposal, and regular check-ins. You always know what's happening and what's next.

How is pricing handled?

Projects are scoped and quoted after a discovery call. We work on fixed-price proposals — no hourly surprises, no scope creep on your end.

Do you offer ongoing support after launch?

Yes. Retainers and on-demand support are available. Most of our clients keep working with us well past launch.

Websites

Can you work with our existing brand?

Absolutely. We design around your brand, or help refine it if needed. The goal is consistency, not reinvention for its own sake.

Can you fix or improve an existing website?

Yes. We regularly audit and rebuild slow or outdated sites. If a full rebuild isn't needed, we'll say so and target the highest-impact fixes.

Automation

Do you only work with n8n?

Yes — we specialize. n8n is open, self-hostable, and powerful enough for nearly every workflow we've encountered. Specializing keeps us sharp.

Where do you host and run automations?

We can deploy n8n on your own infrastructure for full control, or on managed hosting — your choice. We document everything so you're never locked in.

Still have a question? Just ask.

The fastest answer is a quick message. We read every one.

Book a Free Call →
